name: python3-html2text
title: python3-html2text
summary: Python module for converting HTML to Markdown text (Python3 version)
description:
Python module for converting HTML to Markdown text (Python3 version)
html2text is a Python module that converts a page of HTML into clean,
easy-to-read plain ASCII text. Better yet, that ASCII also happens to be
valid Markdown (a text-to-HTML format).
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library, and a script,
html2markdown.

commands.name: html2markdown
commands.description: converts a page of HTML into markdown.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use html2markdown because Python module for converting HTML to Markdown text (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use html2markdown as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `html2markdown [options...] [(filename|url) [encoding]]` as documented upstream for html2markdown.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair html2markdown with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `html2markdown --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: html2markdown - converts a page of HTML into markdown.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install python-html2text. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `html2markdown [options...] [(filename|url) [encoding]]`. Python module for converting HTML to Markdown text (Python3 version).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python module for converting HTML to Markdown text (Python3 version).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: html2markdown - converts a page of HTML into markdown.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install python-html2text
Install with: sudo apt install python-html2text
